case_title: C & C SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLECTOR VS. RAY MONTGOMERY

docket_entries.description: COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $190.49 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MONTGOMERY, RAY DBA RAY MONTGOMERY PAINTING
